---
title: ''
output: html_document
---












# kernel smoothing


# S = Beta
# C = Uniform




```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(MASS)

# values of p1 to test
p_values <- c(0.25, 0.5, 0.75)

# no of monte carlo samples
m <- 500

# sample sizes
ns <- c(100, 500)

s_grid <- seq(0, 1, 0.05)
k <- length(s_grid)

Max <- c(0.1, 0.25, 0.5)

# rho levels
rho_values <- c(-0.5, 0, 0.5)

ALL_RESULTS <- data.frame()

make_kernel_cdf <- function(x, h) {
  force(x); force(h)
  function(y) mean(pnorm((y - x) / h))
}

for (n in ns) {
  for (p1 in p_values) {
    for (maxc in Max) {
      for (rho in rho_values) {
        F_hat_store    <- matrix(NA, nrow = m, ncol = k)
        F_dir_store    <- matrix(NA, nrow = m, ncol = k)   # clean direct
        F_dir_sd_store <- matrix(NA, nrow = m, ncol = k)   # direct + under-reporting
        
        for (i in 1:m) {
          
          # correlated uniforms keep S Beta and C Uniform
          Z <- mvrnorm(n = n, mu = c(0, 0),
                       Sigma = matrix(c(1, rho, rho, 1), 2, 2))
          U1 <- pnorm(Z[,1])
          U2 <- pnorm(Z[,2])
          
          S <- qbeta(U1, 2, 5)
          C <- maxc * U2
          
          L <- rbinom(n, 1, p1)
          Y <- ifelse(L == 0, C, S + C)
          
          dat  <- data.frame(S, C, L, Y)
          dat0 <- subset(dat, L == 0)
          dat1 <- subset(dat, L == 1)
          
          # direct CDF (clean)
          F_S_dir <- sapply(s_grid, function(s) mean(S <= s))
          
          # direct CDF + social desirability (UNDER-reporting)
          # under-reporting reported S smaller
          shift_amt <- 0.25 * sd(S)
          F_S_dir_sd <- pmin(pmax(F_S_dir + shift_amt, 0), 1)
          
          # bandwidths
          h1 <- bw.SJ(dat1$Y)   # for long-list Y
          h0 <- bw.SJ(dat0$Y)   # for short-list Y
          
          # kernel-smoothed CDFs using the formula
          F1_hat <- make_kernel_cdf(dat1$Y, h1)
          F0_hat <- make_kernel_cdf(dat0$Y, h0)

          # IST estimator
          F_S_hat <- sapply(s_grid, function(s) {
            inner_vals <- sapply(dat0$Y, function(Yi) {
              F1_hat(s + Yi) - F0_hat(Yi)
            })
            min(max(mean(inner_vals) + 0.5, 0), 1)
          })
          
          F_dir_store[i, ]    <- F_S_dir
          F_dir_sd_store[i, ] <- F_S_dir_sd
          F_hat_store[i, ]    <- F_S_hat
        }
        
        # TRUE CDF for S
        F_true <- pbeta(s_grid, 2, 5)
        TRUE_mat <- matrix(F_true, m, k, byrow = TRUE)
        
        avg_F_dir    <- colMeans(F_dir_store)
        avg_F_dir_sd <- colMeans(F_dir_sd_store)
        avg_F_hat    <- colMeans(F_hat_store)
        
        bias_dir    <- colMeans(F_dir_store - TRUE_mat)
        bias_dir_sd <- colMeans(F_dir_sd_store - TRUE_mat)
        bias_hat    <- colMeans(F_hat_store - TRUE_mat)
        
        mse_dir    <- colMeans((F_dir_store - TRUE_mat)^2)
        mse_dir_sd <- colMeans((F_dir_sd_store - TRUE_mat)^2)
        mse_hat    <- colMeans((F_hat_store - TRUE_mat)^2)
        
        var_dir    <- apply(F_dir_store, 2, var)
        var_dir_sd <- apply(F_dir_sd_store, 2, var)
        var_hat    <- apply(F_hat_store, 2, var)
        
        results <- data.frame(
          n = n,
          p1 = p1,
          maxc = maxc,
          rho = rho,
          s = s_grid,
          
          F_true = round(F_true, 6),
          
          avg_F_dir    = round(avg_F_dir, 6),
          avg_F_dir_sd = round(avg_F_dir_sd, 6),
          avg_F_hat    = round(avg_F_hat, 6),
          
          bias_dir    = round(bias_dir, 6),
          bias_dir_sd = round(bias_dir_sd, 6),
          bias_hat    = round(bias_hat, 6),
          
          mse_dir    = round(mse_dir, 6),
          mse_dir_sd = round(mse_dir_sd, 6),
          mse_hat    = round(mse_hat, 6),
          
          var_dir    = round(var_dir, 6),
          var_dir_sd = round(var_dir_sd, 6),
          var_hat    = round(var_hat, 6)
        )
        
        write.csv(results,
                  paste0("ISTKernel_n", n,
                         "_p", p1, "_max", maxc,
                         "_rho", rho, "_baseS.csv"),
                  row.names = FALSE
        )
        
        ALL_RESULTS <- rbind(ALL_RESULTS, results)
      }
    }
  }
}

# plot data includes 3 estimators: dir, dir_sd, hat
plot_data_beta_unif <- rbind(
  data.frame(ALL_RESULTS, estimator = "dir",
             bias = ALL_RESULTS$bias_dir,
             mse  = ALL_RESULTS$mse_dir,
             var  = ALL_RESULTS$var_dir),
  
  data.frame(ALL_RESULTS, estimator = "dir_sd",
             bias = ALL_RESULTS$bias_dir_sd,
             mse  = ALL_RESULTS$mse_dir_sd,
             var  = ALL_RESULTS$var_dir_sd),
  
  data.frame(ALL_RESULTS, estimator = "hat",
             bias = ALL_RESULTS$bias_hat,
             mse  = ALL_RESULTS$mse_hat,
             var  = ALL_RESULTS$var_hat)
)

 write.csv(plot_data_beta_unif,
           "ISTKernel_ALL_plot_data_CUNIFORM_SBeta_rho_n_baseS_withSD.csv",
           row.names = FALSE)

```



MSE results with intra-cluster correlation of 0.5 and total sample size of 200.  MSE results for two discrete kernel estimators with intra-cluster correlation of 0.5 and total sample size of 200.










```{r}


plot_data_beta_unif$n <- factor(
  plot_data_beta_unif$n,
  levels = c(100, 500)
)

plot_data_beta_unif$p1 <- factor(
  plot_data_beta_unif$p1,
  levels = c(0.25, 0.5, 0.75)
)

plot_data_beta_unif$rho <- factor(
  plot_data_beta_unif$rho,
  levels = c(-0.5, 0, 0.5),
  labels = c("-0.5", "0", "0.5")
)

plot_data_beta_unif$maxc <- factor(
  plot_data_beta_unif$maxc,
  levels = c(0.1, 0.25, 0.5)
)

# rename legend labels
plot_data_beta_unif$estimator <- factor(
  plot_data_beta_unif$estimator,
  levels = c("dir", "dir_sd", "hat"),
  labels = c("Direct (clean)", "Direct + SD (under)", "IST kernel")
)

LINE_W <- 1.1

for (pp in levels(plot_data_beta_unif$p1)) {

  pd <- subset(plot_data_beta_unif, p1 == pp)

  # Bias
  bias_plot <- ggplot(pd, aes(x = s, y = bias, color = estimator)) +
    geom_line(linewidth = LINE_W) +
    facet_grid(n + rho ~ maxc, scales = "free_y") +
    theme_bw(base_size = 16) +
    theme(
      legend.position = "top",
      plot.caption = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 13)
    ) +
    labs(
      x = "s",
      y = "Bias",
      color = "",
      caption = paste0(
        "Bias results for the direct estimator, direct + SD estimator, and kernel IST estimator ",
        "with S ~ Beta(2,5), C ~ Uniform(0, maxc), and p1 = ", pp, "."
      )
    )

  print(bias_plot)
  ggsave(
    paste0("IST_KERNEL_Bias_CUNIFORM_SBeta_p1_", pp, "_rho_n.png"),
    plot = bias_plot, width = 14, height = 8, dpi = 300
  )

  # Variance
  var_plot <- ggplot(pd, aes(x = s, y = var, color = estimator)) +
    geom_line(linewidth = LINE_W) +
    facet_grid(n + rho ~ maxc, scales = "free_y") +
    theme_bw(base_size = 16) +
    theme(
      legend.position = "top",
      plot.caption = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 13)
    ) +
    labs(
      x = "s",
      y = "Variance",
      color = "",
      caption = paste0(
        "Variance results for the direct estimator, direct + SD estimator, and kernel IST estimator ",
        "with S ~ Beta(2,5), C ~ Uniform(0, maxc), and p1 = ", pp, "."
      )
    )

  print(var_plot)
  ggsave(
    paste0("IST_KERNEL_Variance_CUNIFORM_SBeta_p1_", pp, "_rho_n.png"),
    plot = var_plot, width = 14, height = 8, dpi = 300
  )

  # MSE
  mse_plot <- ggplot(pd, aes(x = s, y = mse, color = estimator)) +
    geom_line(linewidth = LINE_W) +
    facet_grid(n + rho ~ maxc, scales = "free_y") +
    theme_bw(base_size = 16) +
    theme(
      legend.position = "top",
      plot.caption = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 13)
    ) +
    labs(
      x = "s",
      y = "MSE",
      color = "",
      caption = paste0(
        "Mean squared error results for the direct estimator, direct + SD estimator, and kernel IST estimator ",
        "with S ~ Beta(2,5), C ~ Uniform(0, maxc), and p1 = ", pp, "."
      )
    )

  print(mse_plot)
  ggsave(
    paste0("IST_KERNEL_MSE_CUNIFORM_SBeta_p1_", pp, "_rho_n.png"),
    plot = mse_plot, width = 14, height = 8, dpi = 300
  )
}

```




































# C = Gamma
# S = Gamma



```{r}



# values of p1 to test
p_values <- c(0.25, 0.5, 0.75)

# no of monte carlo samples
m <- 500

# sample sizes
ns <- c(100, 500)

# s values where we evaluate the CDF
s_grid <- seq(0, 4, 0.1)
k <- length(s_grid)

# C rates (bigger rate -> smaller spread)
RateC <- c(16, 8, 4, 2)

# rho levels
rho_values <- c(-0.5, 0, 0.5)

ALL_RESULTS <- data.frame()

make_kernel_cdf <- function(x, h) {
  force(x); force(h)
  function(y) mean(pnorm((y - x) / h))
}

for (n in ns) {
  for (p1 in p_values) {
    for (ratec in RateC) {
      for (rho in rho_values) {
        F_hat_store    <- matrix(NA, nrow = m, ncol = k)
        F_dir_store    <- matrix(NA, nrow = m, ncol = k)   # clean direct
        F_dir_sd_store <- matrix(NA, nrow = m, ncol = k)   # direct + under-reporting
        
        for (i in 1:m) {
          
          # correlated uniforms keep S Gamma and C Gamma
          Z <- mvrnorm(n = n, mu = c(0, 0),
                       Sigma = matrix(c(1, rho, rho, 1), 2, 2))
          U1 <- pnorm(Z[,1])
          U2 <- pnorm(Z[,2])
          
          S <- qgamma(U1, shape = 3, rate = 2)
          C <- qgamma(U2, shape = 2, rate = ratec)
          
          L <- rbinom(n, 1, p1)
          Y <- ifelse(L == 0, C, S + C)
          
          dat  <- data.frame(S, C, L, Y)
          dat0 <- subset(dat, L == 0)
          dat1 <- subset(dat, L == 1)
          
          # direct CDF (clean)
          F_S_dir <- sapply(s_grid, function(s) mean(S <= s))
          
          # direct CDF + social desirability (UNDER-reporting)
          # under-reporting reported S smaller
          shift_amt <- 0.10 * sd(S)
          F_S_dir_sd <- pmin(pmax(F_S_dir + shift_amt, 0), 1)
          
          # bandwidths
          h1 <- bw.SJ(dat1$Y)   # for long-list Y
          h0 <- bw.SJ(dat0$Y)   # for short-list Y
          
          # kernel-smoothed CDFs using the formula
          F1_hat <- make_kernel_cdf(dat1$Y, h1)
          F0_hat <- make_kernel_cdf(dat0$Y, h0)

          # IST estimator
          F_S_hat <- sapply(s_grid, function(s) {
            inner_vals <- sapply(dat0$Y, function(Yi) {
              F1_hat(s + Yi) - F0_hat(Yi)
            })
            min(max(mean(inner_vals) + 0.5, 0), 1)
          })
          
          F_dir_store[i, ]    <- F_S_dir
          F_dir_sd_store[i, ] <- F_S_dir_sd
          F_hat_store[i, ]    <- F_S_hat
        }
        
        # TRUE CDF for S
        F_true <- pgamma(s_grid, shape = 3, rate = 2)
        TRUE_mat <- matrix(F_true, m, k, byrow = TRUE)
        
        avg_F_dir    <- colMeans(F_dir_store)
        avg_F_dir_sd <- colMeans(F_dir_sd_store)
        avg_F_hat    <- colMeans(F_hat_store)
        
        bias_dir    <- colMeans(F_dir_store - TRUE_mat)
        bias_dir_sd <- colMeans(F_dir_sd_store - TRUE_mat)
        bias_hat    <- colMeans(F_hat_store - TRUE_mat)
        
        mse_dir    <- colMeans((F_dir_store - TRUE_mat)^2)
        mse_dir_sd <- colMeans((F_dir_sd_store - TRUE_mat)^2)
        mse_hat    <- colMeans((F_hat_store - TRUE_mat)^2)
        
        var_dir    <- apply(F_dir_store, 2, var)
        var_dir_sd <- apply(F_dir_sd_store, 2, var)
        var_hat    <- apply(F_hat_store, 2, var)
        
        results <- data.frame(
          n = n,
          p1 = p1,
          ratec = ratec,
          rho = rho,
          s = s_grid,
          
          F_true = round(F_true, 6),
          
          avg_F_dir    = round(avg_F_dir, 6),
          avg_F_dir_sd = round(avg_F_dir_sd, 6),
          avg_F_hat    = round(avg_F_hat, 6),
          
          bias_dir    = round(bias_dir, 6),
          bias_dir_sd = round(bias_dir_sd, 6),
          bias_hat    = round(bias_hat, 6),
          
          mse_dir    = round(mse_dir, 6),
          mse_dir_sd = round(mse_dir_sd, 6),
          mse_hat    = round(mse_hat, 6),
          
          var_dir    = round(var_dir, 6),
          var_dir_sd = round(var_dir_sd, 6),
          var_hat    = round(var_hat, 6)
        )
        
        write.csv(results,
                  paste0("ISTKernel_n", n,
                         "_SGamma3r2_CGamma2r", ratec,
                         "_p", p1,
                         "_rho", rho,
                         "_baseS.csv"),
                  row.names = FALSE
        )
        
        ALL_RESULTS <- rbind(ALL_RESULTS, results)
      }
    }
  }
}

# plot data includes 3 estimators: dir, dir_sd, hat
plot_data_gamma_gamma <- rbind(
  data.frame(ALL_RESULTS, estimator = "dir",
             bias = ALL_RESULTS$bias_dir,
             mse  = ALL_RESULTS$mse_dir,
             var  = ALL_RESULTS$var_dir),
  
  data.frame(ALL_RESULTS, estimator = "dir_sd",
             bias = ALL_RESULTS$bias_dir_sd,
             mse  = ALL_RESULTS$mse_dir_sd,
             var  = ALL_RESULTS$var_dir_sd),
  
  data.frame(ALL_RESULTS, estimator = "hat",
             bias = ALL_RESULTS$bias_hat,
             mse  = ALL_RESULTS$mse_hat,
             var  = ALL_RESULTS$var_hat)
)

write.csv(plot_data_gamma_gamma,
          "ISTKernel_ALL_plot_data_CGAMMA_SGAMMA_rho_n_baseS_withSD.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)



```








```{r}


plot_data_gamma_gamma$n <- factor(
  plot_data_gamma_gamma$n,
  levels = c(100, 500)
)

plot_data_gamma_gamma$rho <- factor(
  plot_data_gamma_gamma$rho,
  levels = c(-0.5, 0, 0.5),
  labels = c("-0.5", "0", "0.5")
)

plot_data_gamma_gamma$p1 <- factor(
  plot_data_gamma_gamma$p1,
  levels = c(0.25, 0.5, 0.75)
)

plot_data_gamma_gamma$ratec <- factor(
  plot_data_gamma_gamma$ratec,
  levels = c(16, 8, 4, 2)
)

plot_data_gamma_gamma$estimator <- factor(
  plot_data_gamma_gamma$estimator,
  levels = c("dir", "dir_sd", "hat"),
  labels = c("Direct (clean)", "Direct + SD (under)", "IST kernel")
)

LINE_W <- 1.1

for (pp in levels(plot_data_gamma_gamma$p1)) {

  pd <- subset(plot_data_gamma_gamma, p1 == pp)

  # Bias
  bias_plot <- ggplot(pd, aes(x = s, y = bias, color = estimator)) +
    geom_line(linewidth = LINE_W) +
    facet_grid(n + rho ~ ratec, scales = "free_y") +
    theme_bw(base_size = 16) +
    theme(
      legend.position = "top",
      plot.caption = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 13)
    ) +
    labs(
      x = "s",
      y = "Bias",
      color = "",
      caption = paste0(
        "Bias results for the direct estimator, direct + SD estimator, and kernel IST estimator ",
        "with S ~ Gamma(3,2), C ~ Gamma(2, ratec), and p1 = ", pp, "."
      )
    )

  print(bias_plot)
  ggsave(
    paste0("IST_KERNEL_Bias_CGAMMA_SGAMMA_p1_", pp, "_rho_n.png"),
    plot = bias_plot, width = 18, height = 10, dpi = 300
  )

  # Variance
  var_plot <- ggplot(pd, aes(x = s, y = var, color = estimator)) +
    geom_line(linewidth = LINE_W) +
    facet_grid(n + rho ~ ratec, scales = "free_y") +
    theme_bw(base_size = 16) +
    theme(
      legend.position = "top",
      plot.caption = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 13)
    ) +
    labs(
      x = "s",
      y = "Variance",
      color = "",
      caption = paste0(
        "Variance results for the direct estimator, direct + SD estimator, and kernel IST estimator ",
        "with S ~ Gamma(3,2), C ~ Gamma(2, ratec), and p1 = ", pp, "."
      )
    )

  print(var_plot)
  ggsave(
    paste0("IST_KERNEL_Variance_CGAMMA_SGAMMA_p1_", pp, "_rho_n.png"),
    plot = var_plot, width = 18, height = 10, dpi = 300
  )

  # MSE
  mse_plot <- ggplot(pd, aes(x = s, y = mse, color = estimator)) +
    geom_line(linewidth = LINE_W) +
    facet_grid(n + rho ~ ratec, scales = "free_y") +
    theme_bw(base_size = 16) +
    theme(
      legend.position = "top",
      plot.caption = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 13)
    ) +
    labs(
      x = "s",
      y = "MSE",
      color = "",
      caption = paste0(
        "Mean squared error results for the direct estimator, direct + SD estimator, and kernel IST estimator ",
        "with S ~ Gamma(3,2), C ~ Gamma(2, ratec), and p1 = ", pp, "."
      )
    )

  print(mse_plot)
  ggsave(
    paste0("IST_KERNEL_MSE_CGAMMA_SGAMMA_p1_", pp, "_rho_n.png"),
    plot = mse_plot, width = 18, height = 10, dpi = 300
  )
}



```
















# S = Normal ()
# C = Beta(a,a)




```{r}


# values of p1 to test
p_values <- c(0.25, 0.5, 0.75)

# no of monte carlo samples
m <- 500

# sample sizes
ns <- c(100, 500)

s_grid <- seq(-4, 4, 0.1)
k <- length(s_grid)

# C ~ Beta(a,a)
a_values <- c(20, 10, 3, 0.5)

# rho levels
rho_values <- c(-0.5, 0, 0.5)

ALL_RESULTS <- data.frame()

make_kernel_cdf <- function(x, h) {
  force(x); force(h)
  function(y) mean(pnorm((y - x) / h))
}

for (n in ns) {
  for (p1 in p_values) {
    for (a in a_values) {
      for (rho in rho_values) {
        F_hat_store    <- matrix(NA, nrow = m, ncol = k)
        F_dir_store    <- matrix(NA, nrow = m, ncol = k)
        F_dir_sd_store <- matrix(NA, nrow = m, ncol = k)
        
        for (i in 1:m) {
          
          Z <- mvrnorm(n = n, mu = c(0, 0),
                       Sigma = matrix(c(1, rho, rho, 1), 2, 2))
          
          S <- Z[,1]
          
          U2 <- pnorm(Z[,2])
          C  <- qbeta(U2, a, a)
          
          L <- rbinom(n, 1, p1)
          Y <- ifelse(L == 0, C, S + C)
          
          dat  <- data.frame(S, C, L, Y)
          dat0 <- subset(dat, L == 0)
          dat1 <- subset(dat, L == 1)
          
          # direct CDF (clean)
          F_S_dir <- sapply(s_grid, function(s) mean(S <= s))
          
          # direct CDF + social desirability (UNDER-reporting)
          shift_amt <- 0.10 * sd(S)
          F_S_dir_sd <- pmin(pmax(F_S_dir + shift_amt, 0), 1)
          
          # bandwidths
          h1 <- bw.SJ(dat1$Y)
          h0 <- bw.SJ(dat0$Y)
          
          # kernel-smoothed CDFs
          F1_hat <- make_kernel_cdf(dat1$Y, h1)
          F0_hat <- make_kernel_cdf(dat0$Y, h0)

          # IST estimator
          F_S_hat <- sapply(s_grid, function(s) {
            inner_vals <- sapply(dat0$Y, function(Yi) {
              F1_hat(s + Yi) - F0_hat(Yi)
            })
            min(max(mean(inner_vals) + 0.5, 0), 1)
          })
          
          F_dir_store[i, ]    <- F_S_dir
          F_dir_sd_store[i, ] <- F_S_dir_sd
          F_hat_store[i, ]    <- F_S_hat
        }
        
        # TRUE CDF for S
        F_true <- pnorm(s_grid, mean = 0, sd = 1)
        TRUE_mat <- matrix(F_true, m, k, byrow = TRUE)
        
        avg_F_dir    <- colMeans(F_dir_store)
        avg_F_dir_sd <- colMeans(F_dir_sd_store)
        avg_F_hat    <- colMeans(F_hat_store)
        
        bias_dir    <- colMeans(F_dir_store - TRUE_mat)
        bias_dir_sd <- colMeans(F_dir_sd_store - TRUE_mat)
        bias_hat    <- colMeans(F_hat_store - TRUE_mat)
        
        mse_dir    <- colMeans((F_dir_store - TRUE_mat)^2)
        mse_dir_sd <- colMeans((F_dir_sd_store - TRUE_mat)^2)
        mse_hat    <- colMeans((F_hat_store - TRUE_mat)^2)
        
        var_dir    <- apply(F_dir_store, 2, var)
        var_dir_sd <- apply(F_dir_sd_store, 2, var)
        var_hat    <- apply(F_hat_store, 2, var)
        
        results <- data.frame(
          n = n,
          p1 = p1,
          a = a,
          rho = rho,
          s = s_grid,
          
          F_true = round(F_true, 6),
          
          avg_F_dir    = round(avg_F_dir, 6),
          avg_F_dir_sd = round(avg_F_dir_sd, 6),
          avg_F_hat    = round(avg_F_hat, 6),
          
          bias_dir    = round(bias_dir, 6),
          bias_dir_sd = round(bias_dir_sd, 6),
          bias_hat    = round(bias_hat, 6),
          
          mse_dir    = round(mse_dir, 6),
          mse_dir_sd = round(mse_dir_sd, 6),
          mse_hat    = round(mse_hat, 6),
          
          var_dir    = round(var_dir, 6),
          var_dir_sd = round(var_dir_sd, 6),
          var_hat    = round(var_hat, 6)
        )
        
        write.csv(results,
                  paste0("ISTKernel_n", n,
                         "_Snorm_Cbeta_p", p1,
                         "_a", a,
                         "_rho", rho,
                         "_baseS.csv"),
                  row.names = FALSE
        )
        
        ALL_RESULTS <- rbind(ALL_RESULTS, results)
      }
    }
  }
}

# plot data includes 3 estimators: dir, dir_sd, hat
plot_data_norm_beta <- rbind(
  data.frame(ALL_RESULTS, estimator = "dir",
             bias = ALL_RESULTS$bias_dir,
             mse  = ALL_RESULTS$mse_dir,
             var  = ALL_RESULTS$var_dir),
  
  data.frame(ALL_RESULTS, estimator = "dir_sd",
             bias = ALL_RESULTS$bias_dir_sd,
             mse  = ALL_RESULTS$mse_dir_sd,
             var  = ALL_RESULTS$var_dir_sd),
  
  data.frame(ALL_RESULTS, estimator = "hat",
             bias = ALL_RESULTS$bias_hat,
             mse  = ALL_RESULTS$mse_hat,
             var  = ALL_RESULTS$var_hat)
)

write.csv(plot_data_norm_beta,
          "ISTKernel_ALL_plot_data_Snorm_Cbeta_rho_n_baseS_withSD.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)



```














```{r}



plot_data_norm_beta$n <- factor(
  plot_data_norm_beta$n,
  levels = c(100, 500)
)

plot_data_norm_beta$rho <- factor(
  plot_data_norm_beta$rho,
  levels = c(-0.5, 0, 0.5),
  labels = c("-0.5", "0", "0.5")
)

plot_data_norm_beta$p1 <- factor(
  plot_data_norm_beta$p1,
  levels = c(0.25, 0.5, 0.75)
)

plot_data_norm_beta$a <- factor(
  plot_data_norm_beta$a,
  levels = c(20, 10, 3, 0.5)
)

plot_data_norm_beta$estimator <- factor(
  plot_data_norm_beta$estimator,
  levels = c("dir", "dir_sd", "hat"),
  labels = c("Direct (clean)", "Direct + SD (under)", "IST kernel")
)

LINE_W <- 1.1

for (pp in levels(plot_data_norm_beta$p1)) {

  pd <- subset(plot_data_norm_beta, p1 == pp)

  # Bias
  bias_plot <- ggplot(pd, aes(x = s, y = bias, color = estimator)) +
    geom_line(linewidth = LINE_W) +
    facet_grid(n + rho ~ a, scales = "free_y") +
    theme_bw(base_size = 16) +
    theme(
      legend.position = "top",
      plot.caption = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 13)
    ) +
    labs(
      x = "s",
      y = "Bias",
      color = "",
      caption = paste0(
        "Bias results for the direct estimator, direct + SD estimator, and kernel IST estimator ",
        "with S ~ Normal(0,1), C ~ Beta(a,a), and p1 = ", pp, "."
      )
    )

  print(bias_plot)
  ggsave(
    paste0("IST_KERNEL_Bias_Snorm_Cbeta_p1_", pp, "_rho_n.png"),
    plot = bias_plot, width = 18, height = 10, dpi = 300
  )

  # Variance
  var_plot <- ggplot(pd, aes(x = s, y = var, color = estimator)) +
    geom_line(linewidth = LINE_W) +
    facet_grid(n + rho ~ a, scales = "free_y") +
    theme_bw(base_size = 16) +
    theme(
      legend.position = "top",
      plot.caption = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 13)
    ) +
    labs(
      x = "s",
      y = "Variance",
      color = "",
      caption = paste0(
        "Variance results for the direct estimator, direct + SD estimator, and kernel IST estimator ",
        "with S ~ Normal(0,1), C ~ Beta(a,a), and p1 = ", pp, "."
      )
    )

  print(var_plot)
  ggsave(
    paste0("IST_KERNEL_Variance_Snorm_Cbeta_p1_", pp, "_rho_n.png"),
    plot = var_plot, width = 18, height = 10, dpi = 300
  )

  # MSE
  mse_plot <- ggplot(pd, aes(x = s, y = mse, color = estimator)) +
    geom_line(linewidth = LINE_W) +
    facet_grid(n + rho ~ a, scales = "free_y") +
    theme_bw(base_size = 16) +
    theme(
      legend.position = "top",
      plot.caption = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 13)
    ) +
    labs(
      x = "s",
      y = "MSE",
      color = "",
      caption = paste0(
        "Mean squared error results for the direct estimator, direct + SD estimator, and kernel IST estimator ",
        "with S ~ Normal(0,1), C ~ Beta(a,a), and p1 = ", pp, "."
      )
    )

  print(mse_plot)
  ggsave(
    paste0("IST_KERNEL_MSE_Snorm_Cbeta_p1_", pp, "_rho_n.png"),
    plot = mse_plot, width = 18, height = 10, dpi = 300
  )
}





```
